title: Portfolio Theory

prerequisites.text: STA3041F, STA3043S or at the discretion of the Head of Department. STA3045F is strongly recommended.

outline: The course introduces the historical development of ideas from economics, gambling and finance with a South African perspective for portfolio control. Topics include: data-wrangling, portfolio optimisation, sequential historic back-testing and simulation in R; static mean-variance theoretical foundations of portfolio choice, asset pricing and market equilibrium; tactical and strategic portfolios; the Generalised Fundamental Law of Asset Management, the Roll Critique and a Bayesian Black-Litterman portfolio choice framework; active management and its complexities; performance attribution; indexation methods. Advanced topics may include cluster-based portfolio choice, risk-parity models and machine-learning extensions.
